description_long: This is a stone sculpture depicting a standing angelic figure with large, detailed wings extending from its back. The figure is partially draped in a cloth, with muscular anatomy visible on the torso and legs. One arm rests on a rectangular pedestal or block, while the other hand holds a circular wreath. The facial features are finely carved, with wavy hair cascading down to the shoulders. The surface shows signs of weathering, suggesting it may have been exposed to the elements for some time.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a standing angel with wings, holding a wreath and partially draped in cloth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angel's face, torso, draped cloth, and the wreath held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the wings, the wreath, and the arm resting on the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of the wings and the back of the draped cloth.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the angel's side profile, the draped cloth, and the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: angelic human figure holding a wreath
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
